summary: Refined and differentiated voice fingerprints for all 12 supporting characters (CHAR-003 through CHAR-014). Each character now has: (1) an expanded voiceFingerprint with 10 dimensions including vocabularyLevel, sentenceLength, metaphorDensity, emotionalRegister, thoughtPatterns, dialectMarkers, humorStyle, attentionPriority, deflectionPattern, and stressResponse; (2) a dialoguePatterns section with initiationStyle, responseStyle, underPressure, verbalTics, and favoriteExpressions; (3) verified non-overlapping metaphor domains — every character has a unique domain (garden, text, textile, terrain, medicine, absent/bureaucratic, logistics, fire/aftermath, tools/machines, law/contracts, celestial/flame, campaign/attrition) that does not overlap with leads' domains (architecture for Kaelith, water for Lirien). Redistributed sensory channels: moved CHAR-004 Vairen from olfactory to tactile (archival touch) and CHAR-013 Iryse from olfactory to visual (Pallor-watching, light). Final distribution: olfactory 3, tactile 2 (excl. leads), visual 4 (excl. leads), auditory 3. Added supportingVoiceDistinctionGuide to characters/index.json with quick-reference entries, voice contrast matrix, and scene guidance for multi-speaker scenarios. All characters pass the 3-4 sentence test (INV-034) — each has at least one unmistakable verbal tic and a distinct metaphor domain.

voiceOverlapsResolved: Olfactory sensory channel overload: reduced from 5 to 3 by moving Vairen→tactile, Iryse→visual
Military register overlap (Kaelith/Sethis/Tavik): differentiated Kaelith=personal-tactical, Sethis=institutional-logistics, Tavik=bureaucratic-passive
Short-sentence overlap (Kaelith/Tessen/Erys/Kethran): each uses short sentences for different reasons and with different content domains
Ash metaphor overlap (Thalen/Iryse): Thalen=cultivation/garden, Iryse=celestial/flame/sky — ash references removed from Iryse's primary domain

uniqueVoiceTags.CHAR-005: The Excited Weaver — 'Which is to say.'
uniqueVoiceTags.CHAR-009: The Institutional Soldier — 'The Legion's position is clear.'
uniqueVoiceTags.CHAR-011: The Cold Instrument — 'I trust you will comply.'
uniqueVoiceTags.CHAR-012: The Living Contract — 'The binding condition obtains.'
uniqueVoiceTags.CHAR-013: The Faithful Watcher — 'By the Pallor's light.'

invariantsAddressed: INV-003 (Character Voice Distinctness): All 12 supporting voices have unique metaphor domains, sentence profiles, and emotional registers
INV-034 (3-4 Sentence Test): Each character has at least one unmistakable verbal tic that identifies them within 3-4 sentences
INV-055/T17 (POV Voice Fingerprint): All voice parameters are measurable (sentence length ranges, metaphor domains, verbal tics)
INV-019 (Dialogue Naturalism): dialoguePatterns sections define natural speech habits including verbal tics, stress responses, and initiation styles
INV-064/T26 (Sensory Signature): All sensory channels verified unique at lead level, well-distributed across supporting cast
